meaning: n.[化]硬脂,硬脂酸甘油油酯
examples: RBD palm oil can be further processed into RBD palm olein and RBD palm stearin.
Other Ingredients: May contain one or more of the following: magnesium stearate, cellulose, vegetable stearin, dicalcium phosphate and silica.
Comparatively the glycol double stearin produces the pearly luster is intense, the glycol single stearin produces the pearly luster is exquisite.
